surface_verification.justification: Backend triage-producer routing change (append lane on idle main); no UI surface. Verified by the full shared unit suite (3629 passed) incl. a new idle-main-with-origin outbox-routing test; delivery-to-origin is via the existing sweep pipeline.

behaviors.behavior: on idle main (default branch + origin) github_triage action-unit appends route to the gitignored outbox, not the tracked log
github_triage is covered by the static background-producer routing guard (regression fence)
non-idle context (worktree/iterate branch, no origin, non-git) still routes to the tracked log (fail-safe)
behaviors.reason: should_route_to_outbox failure modes are pinned by test_triage_outbox.py::test_should_route_* (iterate-branch/no-origin/non-git → False); this change only consumes that function.

behaviors.behavior: cross-lane dedup + auto-resolve symmetry preserved (tracked ∪ outbox union)
behaviors.reason: test_triage_outbox.py dedup tests (tracked suppresses outbox dup and vice-versa) + the full green suite cover the union invariant this change relies on.
